description_long: This is a modern, multi-functional office desk and shelving unit, featuring a combination of dark wood and light gray panel finishes. The structure includes a spacious desktop with a curved cutout for ergonomic seating, supported by metal legs and two sets of drawers on either side. The upper section consists of a large cabinet with both open shelves and closed compartments, providing ample storage for books, files, and office supplies. The lower section features additional storage drawers and a small cabinet, all equipped with visible handles for easy access. The design is sleek and geometric, with clean lines and a mix of open and closed storage spaces. This unit is suitable for use in urban offices, home workspaces, or study areas, offering both functionality and contemporary style.
description: A modern office desk and shelving unit with dark wood and light gray panels, featuring multiple drawers, cabinets, and open shelves. The design is sleek, functional, and ideal for urban workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric arrangement of dark wood and light gray panels, with closed cabinets and drawers visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit, the curved desktop, and the stacked drawers on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying open shelves, cabinet doors, and the full workspace layout with both drawer units visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved desktop and the light gray panel on the lower right cabinet.
